alkylation reagent: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark at room temperature
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide for 30 min in the dark at room temperature
cleavage agent: incubated overnight with TPCK-treated trypsin at 25 °C
enrichment method: subjected to phosphoTyr antibody binding to enrich for phosphoTyr-containing peptides
fragmentation method: fragment ions generated by the higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) method
instrument: mass spectrometry analysis was carried out in a data-dependent manner with full scans... using an Orbitrap mass analyzer
labeling: We used SILAC methodology to prepare two populations of R367A Abl cells
reduction reagent: reduced with 5 mM dithiothreitol for 30 min at 60 °C
reduction concentration: reduced with 5 mM dithiothreitol for 30 min at 60 °C
